title: History and Autofill
drDigitalIntro:
Your browser remembers everywhere you go — that's History.
• Open History to see the sites you've visited.
• Click one to go back — handy when you forgot to bookmark it.
• Autofill fills forms with saved info like your name and address.

playgroundTask.goal: Revisit an earlier site using History

steps.say: First, visit a site so it's in your history. Type shop.example and press Enter.
Now visit another: type google.com and press Enter. the browser quietly remembers both.
Want to go back to Shop without retyping? Click History, then click Shop in the list.
steps.title: Shop

drDigitalSuccess: You used History to jump back to a site you visited earlier — no need to remember the address. the browser kept the trail for you.
drDigitalHint: Visit both sites first. Then open History and click the Shop entry to return to it.
